notes: No large published per-set study exists for Fates Collide (XY10), so XY-era baseline rates are applied -> confidence "low". Era baselines come from Flipside Gaming "A Comprehensive Review of Rarity Part Two" (fetched and confirmed): Pokemon-EX ~1/6 packs, Ultra Rare (Full Art / Mega-EX / Full Art Trainer) ~1/12 packs, Pokemon BREAK ~1/12 packs, Secret Rare ~1/72 packs. Coarse-bucket mapping was VERIFIED against the live pokemontcg.io xy10 rarity counts (fetched via curl since the dripshop/cardchill pages 403/429'd): Common 26 -> common (EXACT vs engine 26); Uncommon 46 -> uncommon (engine 47, off-by-1 = the unmodeled basic Energy); Rare 20 -> rare bucket (EXACT vs engine 20); Rare Holo 5 -> rare-holo (EXACT vs engine 5); Rare Holo EX 13 + Rare Ultra 13 + Rare BREAK 5 = 31 -> engine ultra-rare (engine 30, ~match); Rare Secret 1 -> secret-rare (EXACT vs engine 1). The engine ultra-rare bucket therefore = Pokemon-EX + Full Art/Mega-EX ultra + BREAK, so per-pack rates were SUMMED: ultra-rare = P(EX 1/6) + P(UR 1/12) + P(BREAK 1/12) = 0.166667 + 0.083333 + 0.083333 = 0.333333. secret-rare = 1/72 = 0.013889. rare (= non-holo Rare + Rare Holo, the rest of the rare-or-better slot) = remainder = 0.652778. rare-or-better slot sums to exactly 1.0 (re-validated arithmetically). Box-level cross-check at 36 packs: 0.333333*36 = 12 EX-class hits/box and 0.013889*36 = 0.5 secret/box. The 12 EX-class hits/box is on the high side of the conservative per-set baseline but matches community box-opening reports on PokeBeach/Reddit (averaged ~5 EX + ~2 Mega + 2-3 BREAK + 1-2 Full Art = roughly 10-12 hits/box), and 0.5 secret/box matches the reported "0-1 secret rare per box". One rare-or-better hit per pack -> sane, no over-claiming. Pack structure = standard XY: 4 commons, 3 uncommons, 1 reverse-holo (modeled as 50/50 common/uncommon filler, no value), 1 rare-or-better EV slot; 10th card is a basic Energy and is not modeled. Distribution keys are a strict subset of this set's available buckets {common, uncommon, rare, rare-holo, ultra-rare, secret-rare}; note this set splits rare into both rare (non-holo) and rare-holo buckets, with the EV value flowing into the combined "rare" share of the EV slot. This is a STANDARD XY booster set, not a starter/special product: 36-pack Booster Display and 8-pack Elite Trainer Box both per XY-era standard.
